pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 causes runtime failures due to removed internal APIs (e.g., javax.* packages replaced by jakarta.*).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling Java 21 source code with a compiler target of 17 will result in compilation errors for new language features (e.g., pattern matching, records).

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler target property to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Generating bytecode for Java 17 when running on Java 21 is not strictly a compile error, but prevents usage of new JVM features and is inconsistent with the source level; however, strictly speaking, this is often required to match the source level to avoid warnings or specific tooling issues, but primarily it's about targeting the correct runtime. Without this, the code compiles but targets the wrong VM version. In the context of 'breaking', if the code uses features only available in 21, the source change is the breaker. The target change ensures the bytecode is valid for the intended runtime. Let's classify as breaking because mismatched source/target is a build configuration error in a migration context.
Older versions of Lombok may not fully support Java 21 bytecode generation or annotation processing, potentially leading to compilation errors or runtime issues with generated code.

spring-boot-actuator/src/main/java/com/a.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-actuator/src/main/java/com/a.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with SecurityFilterChain bean to comply with Spring Security 6 API changes.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter was removed in Spring Security 6; extending it causes a compile error.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace overridden configure method with a SecurityFilterChain bean method.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The configure(HttpSecurity) method no longer exists on the new base class; the new pattern requires a @Bean returning SecurityFilterChain.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.before:
@Override
protected void configure(HttpSecurity http) throws Exception

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity DSL from chained .and() style to lambda-based configuration.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old chained API methods (authorizeRequests, formLogin, etc.) returning the builder for chaining were removed in Spring Security 6; the new API requires lambda arguments.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in authorization rules.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: antMatchers was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Replace deprecated ignoringAntMatchers with ignoringRequestMatchers in CSRF configuration.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: ignoringAntMatchers was removed in Spring Security 6; using it causes a compile error.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Add return statement to build and return the SecurityFilterChain.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The new bean method must return a SecurityFilterChain instance; the old void method did not require this.

spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.general_idea: Update imports to reflect the new SecurityFilterChain and Customizer classes.
spring-boot-admin-server/src/main/java/c.why_exists: The old imports (WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter) are no longer valid or needed; new classes are required for the new API.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.persistence does not exist' errors on Spring Boot 3.x / Java 21.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.general_idea: Update MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId required for Java 21 compatibility.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-boot-data-jp.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may fail to compile or run on Java 21 due to module system restrictions or lack of support; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the supported version.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId required for modern versions.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may not resolve or function correctly with newer Spring Boot/JDK versions; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is the current standard.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: javax.persistence classes are no longer available on the classpath in Spring Boot 3.x (which uses Jakarta EE 9+), causing compilation errors due to missing imports.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate JPA import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.persistence does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x uses jakarta.persistence).

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.persistence does not exist'.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate JPA annotation import from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: javax.persistence package is no longer available in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; using it causes a compile-time 'package not found' error.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing imports and annotations.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are not compatible with JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or compile if old imports/annotations remain while the test engine expects JUnit 5.

spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.general_idea: Migrate datasource platform configuration from deprecated Spring Boot 2.x property to Spring Boot 3.x equivalent.
spring-boot-data-jpa/spring-data-jpa-emb.why_exists: The property 'spring.datasource.platform' was removed in Spring Boot 3.x; using it results in a configuration binding error or ignored setting, whereas 'spring.sql.init.platform' is the correct property for SQL initialization platform detection in Spring Boot 3.

spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update MySQL connector dependency to the new groupId and artifactId required for Java 21 compatibility.
spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and may fail to resolve or run on Java 21 due to module system restrictions or lack of support; the new 'mysql-connector-j' is the supported driver.

spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from the legacy javax.persistence package to the Jakarta EE 9+ jakarta.persistence package.
spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; using it causes a compile-time 'package does not exist' error.

spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/src/test/res.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 2.x datasource platform property with Spring Boot 3.x SQL init platform property.
spring-boot-jpa-dog-service/src/test/res.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removed the 'spring.datasource.platform' property; using it results in an unrecognized configuration property warning or failure depending on strictness settings, and it no longer controls SQL initialization scripts.

spring-boot-read-properties/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace in Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-read-properties/src/main/jav.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x (which runs on Jakarta EE 9+); using the old import causes a compile error (cannot find symbol).

spring-boot-read-properties/src/main/jav.general_idea: Migrate validation constraint imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-read-properties/src/main/jav.why_exists: Compilation error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

spring-boot-samples/src/main/java/com/am.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3.x / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if the old import is retained.

spring-boot-samples/src/main/java/com/am.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java 21.
spring-boot-samples/src/main/java/com/am.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications; using it causes a compile-time error due to missing class.
